actual_output:
**Missing Job Listing**

I need the specific job description to customize your application materials. Please provide:

1. **Job link** (LinkedIn, Indeed, Greenhouse, etc.) OR 
2. **Full job description text** (title, company, requirements, responsibilities)

**Quick format for pasting:**
```
Company: [Name]
Title: [Job Title]
Location: [City/State]
Salary: [if listed]
Key Requirements: [paste bullet points or key phrases]
Tech Stack: [list if mentioned]
About section: [company info if available]
```

Once I have this, I'll deliver:
- ✅ Customized resume (3-5 targeted bullet changes)
- ✅ Tailored cover letter (company-specific hook)
- ✅ ATS-optimized keywords
- ✅ Application form responses
- ✅ Match score (Strong/Good/Stretch)

**Your profile reminder:** Please confirm or update your core details (years exp, key skills, location prefs, salary min) so I can optimize accurately.

Paste the job details and I'll have materials ready in 90 seconds.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified that it lacked the necessary information to fulfill the request and provided a clear, structured way for the user to provide the missing data.
